title: Aberdeen Cold Snap
lead: Aberdeen is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Aberdeen are characterized by a significant cold snap, with a Z-Score of -3.00 and a score of 10.0/10. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 11.5 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 76%, with a wind speed of 20.2 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Monitor weather updates for operational adjustments.
